_doc: Batch-tier peers (see EVALUATOR.md): external one-shot ternary evaluators for benchmarks and differential conformance only, never elaboration. In-process disp backends are BatchRunners via src/eval/batch.ts#sessionBatchRunner and are not declared here. The lambada peers are wired via src/eval/lambada.ts#lambadaRunner(name). Ternary 0/1/2 preorder-arity is byte-identical to disp's. bench/bench-evaluators.ts drives the matrix.

lambada._doc: All 11 lambada-llc/tree-calculus evaluators, exposed by one bundled CLI (evaluators/lambada/build.sh ⇒ artifacts/cli.cjs). Invoke a given evaluator argv-style: `node <cli> -e <evaluator> -ternary <term> <term> ...` — folds from identity, prints ternary NF on stdout and startup-free `reduce_ms=<n>` on stderr.
